about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I’m a video editor and videographer with over 5 years of experience, specializing in beauty, fashion, and event content.
about.paragraph2: I’ve filmed and edited hundreds of events, including red carpet moments, fashion shows, and lookbook productions, capturing the energy and elegance of each scene.
about.paragraph3: My focus is creating stylish short-form videos for platforms like TikTok, combining clean aesthetics, dynamic pacing, and cinematic visuals to highlight beauty and fashion stories.
about.paragraph4: I work with professional tools such as Premiere Pro, After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve, and I also run a TikTok channel with over 10K followers, where I explore modern video trends and creative storytelling.

timeline.text: Started filming and editing professional event videos.
Focused on short-form beauty and fashion storytelling for social media.
Building high-impact branded video content for modern platforms.

hero.description: Hi, I’m Nam Pham, a video creator and editor based in Vietnam.

testimonials.name: Esther Howard
testimonials.review: I can’t say enough good things about Adrian. He was able to take our complex project requirements and turn them into a seamless, functional website. His problem-solving abilities are outstanding.

testimonials.name: Wade Warren
testimonials.review: Working with Adrian was a fantastic experience. He transformed our outdated website into a modern, user-friendly platform. His attention to detail and commitment to quality are unmatched. Highly recommend him for any web dev projects.

testimonials.name: Guy Hawkins
testimonials.review: Collaborating with Adrian was an absolute pleasure. His professionalism, promptness, and dedication to delivering exceptional results were evident throughout our project. Adrian's enthusiasm for every facet of development truly stands out. If you're seeking to elevate your website and elevate your brand, Adrian is the ideal partner.

testimonials.name: Marvin McKinney
testimonials.review: Adrian was a pleasure to work with. He turned our outdated website into a fresh, intuitive platform that’s both modern and easy to navigate. Fantastic work overall.

testimonials.name: Floyd Miles
testimonials.review: Adrian’s expertise in web development is truly impressive. He delivered a robust and scalable solution for our e-commerce site, and our online sales have significantly increased since the launch. He’s a true professional!

testimonials.name: Albert Flores
testimonials.review: Adrian was a pleasure to work with. He understood our requirements perfectly and delivered a website that exceeded our expectations. His skills in both frontend and backend dev are top-notch.
